name: American Red CrossHQ
mission: Since its founding in 1881 by visionary leader Clara Barton, the American Red Cross has been the nation's premier emergency response organization. We bring shelter, food and comfort to those affected by disasters, large and small. We collect lifesaving donated blood and supply it to patients in need. We provide support to our men and women in military bases around the world, and to the families they leave behind. We train communities in CPR, first aid and other skills that save lives. And we assist our neighbors abroad with critical disaster response, preparedness and disease prevention efforts. We are able to do all this by mobilizing the power of volunteers and the generosity of donors.
theoryOfChange: Mobilizing a volunteer force and donor base to provide immediate relief and lifesaving education to prevent and alleviate suffering.
scoreSummary: American Red CrossHQ shows strong impact and good alignment (minor risk deductions applied).

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Good donor alignment with manageable risk. Evidence quality is solid but still evolving in places.

keyConcerns.headline: 94% of expenses stay in the US despite international operations
keyConcerns.detail: Organization claims foreign operations but most spending remains domestic.

components.improvement_suggestion: Add a dedicated zakat page or clearly state whether donations are zakat-eligible.
components.name: Muslim Donor Fit

components.improvement_suggestion: Expand services to underserved populations or geographies with limited nonprofit coverage.
components.name: Underserved Space

alignment.rationale: Alignment 31/50: MEDIUM Muslim donor fit, humanitarian cause area

components.evidence: No beneficiary data available for cost-per-beneficiary scoring; high program ratio (≥85%) suggests efficient delivery
components.improvement_suggestion: Publish beneficiary counts consistently so cost-effectiveness can be assessed.
components.name: Cost Per Beneficiary

components.improvement_suggestion: If reserves are above policy target, document why and publish triggers for planned deployment.
components.name: Financial Health

components.improvement_suggestion: Document a clear theory of change with an explicit causal pathway.
components.name: Theory of Change

risks.risk_summary: Key concern: High domestic burn: 94% of expenses stay in the US despite international operations

risks.description: High domestic burn: 94% of expenses stay in the US despite international operations

score_details.score_summary: American Red CrossHQ shows strong impact and good alignment (minor risk deductions applied).

zakat.claim_evidence: Organization is in zakat denylist (partners but doesn't collect directly) (Source: https://www.redcross.org/donate/donation.html)

all_citations.claim: The organization holds a 100.0/100 score and maintains a 90.8% program expense ratio.
Total revenue for the period was $3,804,377,344.
The mission is to prevent and alleviate human suffering in the face of emergencies.
The organization provides humanitarian help all around the world.
The organization manages significant grants to domestic individuals and foreign organizations.
The organization accepts general charitable donations (sadaqah).

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: The organization earns a 66/100 GMG score due to its high-impact direct services and perfect financial transparency, though alignment with specific Muslim donor preferences is considered medium.
areas_for_improvement: High operational complexity across domestic and international branches
Reliance on large-scale biomedical service revenue alongside traditional donations

dimension_explanations.alignment: As a humanitarian leader, the organization addresses urgent global needs, making it a strong candidate for sadaqah [12]. While it has a long track record of service, the alignment for Muslim donors is rated as medium due to its broad secular mission [3][6].
dimension_explanations.impact: The organization demonstrates high impact through direct service delivery, maintaining a program expense ratio of 90.8% [1][2]. Its financial health is robust, evidenced by a fundraising efficiency of $0.05 per $1 raised and a total revenue of $3,804,377,344 [1][8].

baseline_narrative.headline: The American Red Cross provides critical humanitarian relief and lifesaving services through a massive network of volunteers and donors.
strengths: Exceptional financial accountability with a Charity Navigator score of 100.0/100
High program efficiency with 90.8% of expenses directed toward humanitarian services
Strong liquidity with 12.2 months of working capital available
baseline_narrative.summary: The American Red Cross prevents and alleviates human suffering in the face of emergencies by mobilizing the power of volunteers and the generosity of donors [3]. The organization operates major programs including Lifesaving Blood services, Training Services, and support for America’s military families [1][8].
